      class AbstractModelObservationTableModel extends AbstractSyntheticObservationTableModel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • seriesType

    • Class org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.model.list.AbstractSyntheticObservationTableModel

      class AbstractSyntheticObservationTableModel extends AbstractTableModel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • obs
          List<ValidObservation> obs
        • observationToRowIndexMap
          WeakHashMap<ValidObservation,Integer> observationToRowIndexMap
          A weak reference hash map from observations to row indices. We only want this map's entries to exist if they (ValidObservation instances in particular) are in use elsewhere.

    • Class org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.model.list.InvalidObservationTableModel

      class InvalidObservationTableModel extends AbstractTableModel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • invalidObservations
          List<InvalidObservation> invalidObservations

      class ValidObservationTableModel extends AbstractTableModel implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • columnCount
          int columnCount
          The total number of columns in the table.
        • columnInfoSource

          The source of column information.

        • obsSourceListMap
          Map<SeriesType,List<ValidObservation>> obsSourceListMap
          A mapping from series to valid observations.
        • validObservations

          The list of valid observations retrieved.
        • validObservationToRowIndexMap
          WeakHashMap<ValidObservation,Integer> validObservationToRowIndexMap
          A weak reference hash map from observations to row indices. We only want this map's entries to exist if they (ValidObservation instances in particular) are in use elsewhere.

    • Class org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.model.plot.ObservationPlotModel

      class ObservationPlotModel extends org.jfree.data.xy.AbstractIntervalXYDataset implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • atLeastOneVisualBandPresent
          boolean atLeastOneVisualBandPresent
          Is at least one visual band observation present?
        • coordSrc
          ICoordSource coordSrc
          Coordinate and error source.
        • discrepantListener
          Listener<DiscrepantObservationMessage> discrepantListener
          Discrepant observation listener.
        • excludedListener
          Listener<ExcludedObservationMessage> excludedListener
          Excluded observation listener.
        • filterSeriesNum
          int filterSeriesNum
        • lastSinglySelectedSeries
          SeriesType lastSinglySelectedSeries
          What was the most recently singly selected series (e.g. via a dialog).
        • modelFunctionSeriesNum
          int modelFunctionSeriesNum
        • modelSeriesNum
          int modelSeriesNum
        • obComparator
          Comparator<ValidObservation> obComparator
          An observation comparator (e.g. to provide an ordering over time: JD or phase).
        • residualsSeriesNum
          int residualsSeriesNum
        • seriesNum
          int seriesNum
          A unique next series number for this model.
        • seriesNumToObSrcListMap
          Map<Integer,List<ValidObservation>> seriesNumToObSrcListMap
          A mapping from series number to a list of observations where each such list is a data series.
        • seriesNumToSrcTypeMap
          Map<Integer,SeriesType> seriesNumToSrcTypeMap
          A mapping from series number to source type.
        • seriesToBeJoinedVisually
          Set<Integer> seriesToBeJoinedVisually
          A collection of series to be joined visually.
        • seriesVisibilityMap
          Map<SeriesType,Boolean> seriesVisibilityMap
          A mapping from series numbers to whether or not they visible.
        • srcTypeToSeriesNumMap
          Map<SeriesType,Integer> srcTypeToSeriesNumMap
          A mapping from source type to series number.
